description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.3.3 Docker image. Define a single job named test that runs in the default test stage on runners tagged "shared". In its before_script execute: apt-get update, apt-get upgrade -y, apt-get -y install nodejs sqlite3, gem install bundler, bundle install, export RAILS_ENV=test, rails db:create and rails db:migrate; then in the script run rake. No caches, artifacts, services, or conditional rules are required.
